mapper.sql: c."id", c."creator_id", c."creation_time", c."modifier_id", c."modification_time", c."conversation_id", c."title", c."pinned", c."deleted"
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM "conversation" WHERE "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM "conversation_group_relation" r WHERE r."creator_id" = "conversation"."creator_id" AND r."conversation_id" = "conversation"."conversation_id" )
AND "title" ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
